item.title: Hacker News

item.title: Cold Turkey - News
item.description:
Cold Turkey - News 变更摘要
新增(16):
+ Blocker 4.9(2) (1 Mar 2026)
+ * Added option to block split view in browsers (extension update pending)
+ * Added new folder picker on Windows
+ * Added ability to extend locked scheduled blocks
+ * Fixed multiple bugs caused by going into sleep mode on macOS
+ * Fixed incorrect Safari stats on macOS
+ * Fixed YouTube channel blocking/exceptions with collaborators
+ * Fixed some browsers not being blocked
+ * Fixed more time range bugs
+ * Fixed scheduled lock bugs and advanced warnings
+ * Fixed issue caused with comma in custom text break on macOS
+ * Fixed bug caused when exporting blocks
+ * Fixed bug after adding new blocks with settings password
+ * Fixed other minor bugs
+ Blocker 4.9(1) (1 Feb 2026)
+ Blocker 4.9(0) (1 Dec 2025)
